response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist engineer with roughly 15 years of software development experience and genuinely relevant recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience amounts to about six months; the resume shows no Python, no vector database or RAG work, no evaluation/observability pipelines for AI systems, and no evidence of leading customer-facing technical discovery at the level expected of a staff forward deployed engineer. An unexplained career gap since October 2025 adds further uncertainty about current momentum in a fast-moving GenAI field.
strengths: 15+ years of broad, production software engineering across web, backend, and embedded systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq
Strong TypeScript/Node.js skills plus AWS and Kubernetes deployment experience
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions (~6 months of AI-adjacent work)
No demonstrated Python, vector database, RAG, or LLM evaluation experience
Unexplained career gap since October 2025 and no customer-facing GenAI delivery track record

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic-workflow tooling exposure
Deep general software engineering and cloud background
